commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=22d6bb968cebed285fb557b6b4cd62318c12fd19)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `argsMenu: "auto"` to `/verbose` and changes Telegram native command menus to prepend current verbose/reasoning levels from the session store.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path for the PR defects: the new title code skips configured defaults, and the shared `/verbose` registry change contradicts an existing no-arg status test. I did not run live Telegram proof because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: This needs contributor real-behavior proof plus maintainer acceptance of the shared `/verbose` no-arg behavior before any automated repair or merge path is appropriate.

target.title: fix(commands): show current level in /verbose and /reasoning menus
target.body:
## Summary

The v1 fix (#85150, closed) added `argsMenu: "auto"` to `/verbose` but bypassed the current status display. This proper fix:

1. Adds `argsMenu: "auto"` to `/verbose` (matching `/think`, `/trace`, `/fast`)
2. Extends `formatTelegramCommandArgMenuTitle` to show current verbose and reasoning levels in the menu title
3. Loads session entry to resolve current levels from session store

## Before

```
Current verbose level: off
Options: on, off, full
```

User must type the option manually.

## After

```
Current verbose level: off.
Choose verbose level: [on] [off] [full]
```

Inline buttons rendered, current level preserved.

## Changes

- `src/auto-reply/commands-registry.shared.ts`: Added `argsMenu: "auto"` to /verbose
- `extensions/telegram/src/bot-native-commands.ts`: Extended menu title to show current verbose/reasoning levels

## Testing

- Verified /think already shows current level with argsMenu
- The pattern is identical to how /think handles currentThinkingLevel

Fixes #85088
